title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
summary_full: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
summary_public: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
